name: GPU Compute Test
description: WebGPU計算とCUDA/OpenCL外部アダプターのテストプラグイン

nodes.title: GPU Scale Array
nodes.description: WebGPUが利用可能ならGPUで数値配列を倍率変換します。利用不可ならCPUへフォールバックします。

runtime.handler: const values=(Array.isArray(inputs.values)?inputs.values:[]).map(Number); const scale=Number(inputs.scale); const gpu=navigator.gpu; if(!gpu){ return {result:values.map(v=>v*scale),backend:'cpu'}; } try { const adapter=await gpu.requestAdapter(); if(!adapter) throw new Error('adapter'); const device=await adapter.requestDevice(); const source=new Float32Array(values); const size=source.byteLength; const U=GPUBufferUsage; const input=device.createBuffer({size,usage:U.STORAGE|U.COPY_DST}); const output=device.createBuffer({size,usage:U.STORAGE|U.COPY_SRC}); const read=device.createBuffer({size,usage:U.COPY_DST|U.MAP_READ}); device.queue.writeBuffer(input,0,source); const module=device.createShaderModule({code:'struct Params { scale: f32 }; @group(0) @binding(0) var<storage,read> inputData: array<f32>; @group(0) @binding(1) var<storage,read_write> outputData: array<f32>; @group(0) @binding(2) var<uniform> params: Params; @compute @workgroup_size(64) fn main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) { if(id.x < arrayLength(&outputData)){ outputData[id.x]=inputData[id.x]*params.scale; } }'}); const params=device.createBuffer({size:16,usage:U.UNIFORM|U.COPY_DST}); device.queue.writeBuffer(params,0,new Float32Array([scale,0,0,0])); const pipeline=device.createComputePipeline({layout:'auto',compute:{module,entryPoint:'main'}}); const group=device.createBindGroup({layout:pipeline.getBindGroupLayout(0),entries:[{binding:0,resource:{buffer:input}},{binding:1,resource:{buffer:output}},{binding:2,resource:{buffer:params}}]}); const encoder=device.createCommandEncoder(); const pass=encoder.beginComputePass(); pass.setPipeline(pipeline); pass.setBindGroup(0,group); pass.dispatchWorkgroups(Math.ceil(values.length/64)); pass.end(); encoder.copyBufferToBuffer(output,0,read,0,size); device.queue.submit([encoder.finish()]); await read.mapAsync(GPUMapMode.READ); const result=Array.from(new Float32Array(read.getMappedRange().slice(0))); read.unmap(); return {result,backend:'webgpu'}; } catch { return {result:values.map(v=>v*scale),backend:'cpu-fallback'}; }

nodes.title: CUDA External Task
nodes.description: JSON stdin/stdout ABIでCUDAアダプターEXEを呼び出す前提ノードです。

nodes.title: OpenCL External Task
nodes.description: JSON stdin/stdout ABIでOpenCLアダプターEXEを呼び出す前提ノードです。
